series_metadata.series_description: These reports are a listing of findings, recommendations, and material weaknesses found by the Auditor of State during the yearly review of the Ohio Department of Taxation. This record series also includes responsive documents from the Ohio Department of Taxation to the Auditor of State.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 calendar years following Auditor of State review ; Electronic: Retain 5 calendar years following Auditor of State review., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
